_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of target methods and procedures.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of statistical inference methods, including hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, Bayesian inference, and the assumptions underlying each method.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-005 (AB, cosine: 0.506), RM-K-002 (RM, cosine: 0.504).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.508). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, methods]. DCWF-only terms [procedures, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [assumptions, bayesian, confidence, hypothesis, inference, intervals] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.921, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.068 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of target methods and procedures." and "Knowledge of statistical inference methods, including hypothesis testing, confid" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.536 ≈ STS 0.508 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, methods] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, methods]. DCWF-only: [procedures, target]. WIDAI-only: [assumptions, bayesian, confidence, hypothesis, inference, intervals].
